text:
Automation will get your account banned" — that's only true if you're doing it wrong.

Browser hacks and scrapers? Yes, ban risk. Official Meta API? That's literally what Meta gave us to build on.

This account runs on the official API. Posts every day. Learns from every post. Zero bans. Zero manual work. Tokens refresh themselves.

Two hours to set up. Free tools. The system improves without you.

The myth survives because people don’t know the difference. Now you do.

Full setup...
